subtitle: Open-source software for construction — install, update and launch

tabs.openHere: Open web version in a tab

selfUpdate.description: You're on v{{current}} — v{{latest}} of OpenAEC Installer is ready.
selfUpdate.started: The installer has started — follow its steps. OpenAEC Installer closes during the update; you can reopen it afterwards.
selfUpdate.restartToApply: The new version has been installed — close OpenAEC Installer and start it again to use the update.
selfUpdate.noInstaller: No installer for this operating system in the latest release — update manually via GitHub.

errors.rate_limited: GitHub rate limit reached, try again later
errors.rateLimitedUntil: GitHub rate limit reached — available again at {{time}}
errors.noInstaller: No installer for this operating system in the latest release

installerStarted: The installer has started — follow its steps. The status will update automatically afterwards.
installedDone: Installed — you can launch the tool now.
